summary: We are pivoting hard to Asia with the China Going-Global report and Intelligent China launch, while racing to finalize the school brochure, social media agency, and Tech in Asia event proposal this week.
summaryDetail: The biggest priority is the joint CKGSB-IE report on Chinese companies going global to Southeast Asia, targeting a mid-September launch at Tech in Asia Singapore. Felix needs to deliver the one-pager proposal and confirm event themes with Tech in Asia and Tyson this week. Separately, the Intelligent China program webpage must go live this week, and Daisy is launching the Asia Start campaign with two parallel routes (AI and traditional) for the first month. Urgently, the team must expedite social media agency selection (prioritizing Media Minds), finalize the school brochure feedback by June 30, and send the Tech in Asia conference proposal for approval. Also due this week: conversion tracking audit, website menu review, and Shun Tian Shu press release incorporating 10 points. Upcoming: Q3 planning review with Zhang Shouhuo, EV event proposal finalization, and CES press release sign-off.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Meeting
meetings.summary: Team discusses SEO strategy to rank for AI, EVs, and smart manufacturing in China, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team discussed feedback on website menu, progress on brochures and videos, social media agency search, and IE report translation. Decisions made on Shun Tian Shu press release approach and prioritizing Media Minds for social media.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with op-eds from deans and case studies. Report to launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson event in Singapore mid-September.

meetings.title: Asia Start & Intelligent China Campaign Planning
meetings.summary: Discussed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional) and introduced new Intelligent China program targeting foreigners, with focus on module one in Beijing.

meetings.title: EU-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on EU-China relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in shaping cooperation.

decisions.text: Prioritize Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships.
Intelligent China webpage to launch this week.
Only one press release for Shun Tian Shu, incorporating the 10 points.
Prioritize Media Minds as social media agency due to budget constraints and time.
Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, distributed via both schools' channels.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Report to be ready by early September for Singapore events in mid-September.
Op-eds from CKGSB president Santiago and IE dean Hi How; case studies from report or alumni.
Asia Start campaign will run two parallel routes (AI and traditional) for the first month.
decisions.meetingTitle: Asia Start & Intelligent China Campaign Planning

decisions.text: Intelligent China program will be marketed with focus on module one in Beijing.
decisions.meetingTitle: Asia Start & Intelligent China Campaign Planning

decisions.text: Tech in Asia Singapore conference main stage and CKGSB-named luncheon will be on September 15.
